nasb.text: But he took his stand in the midst of the plot, defended it and struck the Philistines; and the Lord brought about a great victory.

esv.text: But he took his stand in the midst of the plot and defended it and struck down the Philistines, and the Lord worked a great victory.

cnv.text: 沙瑪卻在那塊田中間站穩腳步，保護了那塊田，又擊殺了非利士人。耶和華又使以色列人獲得了大勝利。

ccb.text: 沙玛却站在田中间击杀敌人，保卫了那块田。那次，耶和华使以色列人大获全胜。
